message:
test(dialog): add 38 edge-case tests for modal dialog widget (bd-1is2p)

Cover: state default-vs-new, reset/reuse, take_result consume semantics,
closed-dialog event rejection, prompt Tab/Shift+Tab full cycle, arrow key
navigation + input-focused guard, Backspace on empty input, Delete clears,
char accumulation, prompt cancel returns Cancel, custom button activation,
zero-size rendering, closed dialog render noop, builder hit_id/modal_config,
content_height for alert/prompt/empty, unicode button width, DialogResult
equality, mouse down with mismatched/OOB hit, mouse up on different button,
non-prompt clears input_focused, key release ignored, enter with no focused
and no primary, style setters, trait coverage (Clone/Debug) for all types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
